title: potentilla argentea subvar. tenerrima
intro: Potentilla argentea subvar. tenerrima, also known as the delicate cinquefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Potentilla argentea subvar. tenerrima include treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
